summary: The diff implements fixes for both REQ-1 and REQ-2. App.tsx gains a LoadingScreen component, ErrorBoundary integration, and an AuthenticatedLayout that checks isInitializing before redirecting. AuthenticatedOnly.tsx is updated with explicit loading states for both isInitializing and loginStatus === 'initializing'. The ErrorBoundary.tsx is enhanced with a readable fallback UI including auth-specific error messaging, retry/reload buttons, and copy-to-clipboard for error details. All changes are confined to the frontend with no backend modifications.

missing_requirements.requirement: The QueryClientProvider and router are initialized in an order that prevents queries from firing before the identity is ready.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the router and QueryClient are initialized at module level outside components, and App.tsx is truncated so the full render order of QueryClientProvider vs. the initialization guard cannot be fully verified. The file summary mentions an AppInitializationGuard that blocks router rendering until InternetIdentityProvider finishes initializing, but this component is not visible in the truncated diff content, making it impossible to confirm the QueryClientProvider/router ordering AC is fully met.

hallucinated_features.description: AuthenticatedOnly guard component with useNavigate-based redirect logic maintained alongside the new AuthenticatedLayout route guard
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request architecture uses TanStack Router with route-level AuthenticatedLayout using throw redirect, but the AuthenticatedOnly.tsx component was also updated with its own navigation logic. This creates a potentially redundant parallel guard not clearly requested, and its usage in the new routing setup is not confirmed by the diff.
